text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Mejiro Dober is training in her signature
racewear to get a feel for what it'll be like in a
real race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Could I take a break? I can't seem to run well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes aren't on me as she says that. Instead...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That racewear... She must be a Mejiro. It looks
like her game's off today.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was just her first lap. Let's see how
things go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems bothered by the presence of other
trainers watching her run.
choice_data_list: Want to call off training for today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All I said is that I wanted to take a break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: We don't have to go that far... It's just, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I hate this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to stress her out more, but my
suggestion ends up doing just that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to stress her out more, but my
suggestion ends up doing just that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At times like this, I wonder if her previous trainer
would have been able to sympathize with her
more...
choice_data_list: (No, this isn't the time for that!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chase after Mejiro Dober and search all over the
academy before finally finding her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I told you I was fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What are you apologizing for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...It's okay. You don't need to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The colors of this racewear are the traditional
colors of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I settled on this design because I want to be able
to run like the others too... like a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But... when I think of people seeing me run as a
member of the Mejiro family...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't run with the same dominance and elegance
that McQueen shows...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Nor can I meet people's expectations as
confidently and cheerfully as Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They're leaps and bounds ahead of me, and so
long as I'm wearing this, I'll always be compared
to them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried that my running will bring shame to
the Mejiro name...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
How could you? Don't just say whatever to try
and console me!
choice_data_list: I know what it's like to have big shoes to fill.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?
choice_data_list: I know what it's like to have big shoes to fill.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I see... You're struggling with the same thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And yet, you aren't backing down from it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Then I won't either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...And how could I, after seeing how hard you
work?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Nothing good will come from running away.
Besides, it would be irritating if I lost to you.
choice_data_list: There's no need to pressure yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I won't give up. We can do this, together.
choice_data_list: There's no need to pressure yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Cut it out with that chipper attitude! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You don't have to shout... I-it's embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, Dober, it's you! I couldn't help but come
over when I saw the Mejiro colors.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, Dober, it's you! I couldn't help but come
over when I saw the Mejiro colors.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What kind of training are you doing today?
Something tells me this is no ordinary session.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, I'm trying to replicate what a real race will
feel like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that would explain the racewear, and why
something felt different about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To don those colors is to shoulder the Mejiro
name. May I have the pleasure of testing your
readiness for such a responsibility?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You mean you want to race me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Only if you would allow it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I'll show you that I'm ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them have a spectacular run, and
training goes well after that. The sight of them
gets spectators cheering from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I have to try...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I have to try...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's true... But where?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Lifting weights in racewear doesn't exactly feel
like an action befitting the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Lifting weights in racewear doesn't exactly feel
like an action befitting the Mejiro name.
Lifting in racewear? I love it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for coming in out of nowhere. I was doing
some bench presses when I heard your voice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm serious about what I just said, by the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No matter where you do it, just trying your best
to get stronger is what the Mejiro name's all
about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um... Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You're welcome! All right! Time for me to get
back to it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ryan. And...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I suppose I'm grateful for you too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you for always cheering me on, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober gets in a good workout while
wearing her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober gets in a good workout while
wearing her signature racewear.
